svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 738px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1F3864;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1F3864, #abc0e6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 219, 216), rgb(66, 37, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 67px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #C00000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#C00000, #ffa7a7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Upfront — written before work begins
Frozen — locked after sign-off
Obsolete — diverges from the system as it evolves
Waterfall-native — assumes complete knowledge upfront

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 239, 218), rgb(28, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(55, 86, 35), rgb(154, 181, 137));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 67px; margin-left: 391px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #375623;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#375623, #9ab589); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 402px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Incremental — written as understanding develops
Versioned — evolves with the system
Automated — validated by CI, not by intention
Agile-compatible — precision without completeness upfront

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(221, 238, 255), rgb(21, 36, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(31, 56, 100), rgb(171, 192, 230));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 140px; margin-left: 261px;

div.div: The misconception lives here — both sides require rigour

div.div:
IEEE 830
Big Design Upfront
Waterfall SRS

div.div:
⚠ The Agile reaction to waterfall was understandable — but
misread as 'no specification'. Precision and agility coexist.
